mission.title: open-policy-agent-opa-: Fix performance impact of bundle activation on policy queries
mission.description: These changes resolve #1515 by caching the compiler created during bundle activation and passing it through to the manager's trigger callback. See the commit messages for a bit more info.

resolution.summary: This PR backports for the fixes in #1516 and #1551 to the 0.12 release.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
